title: Item Glow
description: Adds emissive rendering to items. Items with _emissive textures glow at full brightness in-hand, in GUIs, and when rendered. Client-side, lightweight, and compatible with modded items and resource packs.
body:
## **Item Glow** adds true emissive rendering to items in Minecraft.

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-JOIN-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/6NJZSxXFPV) [![Ko-fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-SUPPORT-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/bobotweaks) [![Fiverr](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fiverr-HIRE%20ME-3f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=fiverr&logoColor=white)](https://www.fiverr.com/s/1qZlPl6)

Any item that uses an _emissive texture variant will render at full brightness - glowing in your hand, in inventories, and anywhere items are rendered. No shaders. No OptiFine.

This is a lightweight, client-side mod designed to feel like a missing vanilla feature.

## Features
- Emissive items render at full brightness
- Works in-hand, in GUIs, and all item render contexts
- Automatic detection via _emissive textures
- Compatible with modded items and resource packs
- No shaders or OptiFine required
- Minimal performance impact

## How it works

Simply add an _emissive texture variant to your item model.
Item Glow handles the rest.
No configs required. No special APIs. Just works.

Example: https://bobotweaks.gitbook.io/item-glow/

## Compatibility
- Client-side only
- Works alongside most rendering and content mods
- Safe to use on servers (visual only)
